Table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL

Card of table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL

Name

RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL

Code

RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANTS_MATERIALS

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE AS PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE AS COUNTRY_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_MATERIALS_CODE AS VARIANT_MATERIAL_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_MATERIALS_DESCRIPTION_EN AS VARIANT_MATERIAL_DESCRIPTION,

__LOAD_TS AS VALID_FROM

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANTS_MATERIALS

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_MATERIALS_CODE

Primary key(s) Target: COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK, VARIANT_MATERIAL_CODE_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

based on COUNTRY_CODE_BK (events_country_code)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL

CKT_RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG


Server validation rule of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL

drop table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL (
PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
VARIANT_MATERIAL_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
VARIANT_MATERIAL_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_ primary key (COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK, VARIANT_MATERIAL_CODE_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL set comment = 'Reference data entity capturing the material codes and descriptions linked to a specific product variant.';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL.PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the variant product (events_products_variants_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL.VARIANT_MATERIAL_CODE_BK is
'Variant Material Code (events_products_variants_materials_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL.VARIANT_MATERIAL_DESCRIPTION is
'Variant Material Description (EN) (events_products_variants_materials_description_en )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active (VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active (VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31)';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_MATERIAL.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the record is active (ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.)';
